eden_session.wake_excerpt: KC.US case disappeared from roster → v2 exit rule 1 triggered
supporting_evidence: Eden case roster drop (v2 exit rule 1)

claude.reasoning: v2 exit discipline: case disappearance from roster triggers cover regardless of P&L.
concerns: 3-min hold is very short — case roster churn could be noise, not real signal fade
prior_knowledge_used: Eden-signal exit rule (never use arbitrary % stops)
KC 3-min whipsaw lesson — case roster churn ≠ signal fade
alternatives_considered: switch to momentum-derivative exit instead of roster churn
claude.decision_rationale: Follow v2 rules as written but flag the whipsaw concern for post-session retrospective

retrospective.what_worked: v2 exit rule fired deterministically — discipline honored
retrospective.what_didnt: 3-min hold was too short; case roster churn may not reflect real signal fade
retrospective.would_do_differently: Add velocity+acceleration check before exit on roster churn (per feedback_exit_on_momentum_derivative)
retrospective.new_pattern_observed: Case roster can flip within 3 min without price fade — roster is noisier than momentum signal
retrospective.eden_gap: Eden emits case-roster event but not signal-momentum-derivative; exit decisions lack second-order signal read
